commits.author: Rocket
lines: Updated autowarp to use the preset warp values, and to show as it changes between, similar to how autowarp works in KSP.
Tweaked global bloom values to work better with the default tonemapper.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Tweaked sun flare settings to work better for varying distances and be less blinding in the map view.

commits.author: joshohagan
lines: Add buffer offset alignment variables to Utils.cs. The "MinUniformBufferOffsetAlignment" and "MinStorageBufferOffsetAlignment" have long variable names to access, so it is convenient to store them in Rendering/Utils.cs.

commits.author: joshohagan
lines: Replace "MinStorageBufferOffsetAlignment" variable with Utils variable. The Utils.cs variable name is much shorter and cleaner.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Show an alert when manual vehicle controls do not respond due to high warp factor.
Permit throttle down and maine engine cutoff no matter the current warp factor.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added a null check to Popups so the debugger stops breakpointing on it even though it's caught in a try/catch.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Fixed some problems with how we handle closing outside the main loop. The game should hopefully no longer get stuck open when crashing during loading.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Cache next periapsis/apoapsis time on Vehicle each frame.
Ironed out some weirdness with focus transitions in the map controller camera.

commits.author: matthew.caradus
lines: Added basic music player class and data class for music playlists.

commits.author: matthew.caradus
lines: Added Volume faders for sfx, UI and Music.
Added The output channel group can now be assigned in SoundReference xml definition. If now channelgroup is assigned it will default to Sfx.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Migrated Burn Computer from IMGUI to Gauge system. Now shows a gauge based display for next burn information. Includes toggle buttons and roller indicators for values.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Added burn delta-v number will be disabled with barber pole like other burn values.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Added tooltips to Burn Computer buttons and rollers.

commits.author: Dean Hall
lines: Resized Autopilot Settings window for the flight computer now that burn computer buttons are located on another window.
